<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Peginterferon Beta-1A 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Treatment of relapsing remitting multiple sclerosis in adult patients.</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>relapsing-remitting multiple sclerosis（99.7%）</li>
<li>heart neoplasm（94.1%）</li>
<li>congenital anomaly of ventricular septum（89.3%）</li>
<li>heart conduction disease（89.3%）</li>
<li>borderline ovarian serous tumor（88.9%）</li>
<li>rete ovarii cystadenoma（88.8%）</li>
<li>ovarian mucinous cystadenofibroma（88.4%）</li>
<li>ovarian benign neoplasm（88.4%）</li>
<li>ovarian papillary cystadenoma（88.2%）</li>
<li>malignant ovarian Brenner tumor（88.1%）</li>
<li>pericardium disease（88.0%）</li>
<li>serous neoplasm（88.0%）</li>
<li>ovarian surface papilloma（88.0%）</li>
<li>mucinous ovarian cystadenoma（87.9%）</li>
<li>cardiovascular disease（87.8%）</li>
<li>cardiac anomalies-heterotaxy syndrome（86.2%）</li>
<li>heart aneurysm（86.2%）</li>
<li>myocardial rupture（86.2%）</li>
<li>cor biloculare（86.2%）</li>
<li>carcinoid heart disease（86.2%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
